
# Arch

These are my [Arch Linux](https://archlinux.org/) install scripts.

## Install Scripts

Run this to install my [Arch Linux](https://archlinux.org/) configs.
```sh
./install-cfg.sh
```

Run this to install my [Arch Linux](h://archlinux.org/) apps.
```sh
./install-apps.sh
```

Run this for a base install of my [Arch Linux](h://archlinux.org/).
```sh
./setup.sh
```
